title: Star Wars: Jedi (one-shots)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Jedi}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:Swjed3cover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Jedi'' |writer=*[[John Ostrander]] *[[Jeremy Barlow]] |penciller=*[[Jan Duursema]] *[[HOON]] |inker=*[[Dan Parsons]] *HOON |letterer=*[[Digital Chameleon]] *[[Sno Cone Studios]] *[[Michael David Thomas]] |colorist=*[[Brad Anderson|Joe Wayne]] *HOON |cover artist=*Jan Duursema *Brad Anderson *HOON |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[February 26]], [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]'' |end date=[[July 21]], [[2004]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54285/star_wars_jedi_-_yoda_2004_1|text=Star Wars: Jedi - Yoda (2004) #1}} |schedule= |format=Completed |issues=5 |timeline=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]The date of this story is established internally in relation to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} The '''''Star Wars: Jedi''''' series of comics was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] from August 20, [[2003]] to July 21, [[2004]] as a series of one-shots chronicling the actions of five [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Media== ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" width="33%" align="center"|Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" width="33%" align="center"|Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" width="33%" align="center"|Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
